title: Nangong Han
content:
Nangong Han
 is an  talented and powerful cultivator who has always been strongest person amongst those at the same cultivation as him. He is a member of the  
Nangong Family
.

Personality
[
]

He seems to have a knack for annoying people as he can talk endlessly for days.

History
[
]

When 
Wang Lin
 came to the southern realm to complete for a spot in the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
, Nangong Han was the only person able to fight him. However, because Wang Lin was able to use Spatial Bending, Nangong Han wasn't able to to beat him. Nangong Han later because obsessed with Wang Lin and often times bothered him, hoping to gain some enlightenment on Spatial Bending.
